hero.headline: Smarter quality operations for food factories
hero.subheadline: Automate monitoring and stay ahead of regulatory and certification requirements.

solution.title: The solution: digitization and automation
solution.intro: We help factories digitize and automate these workflows:
items: Alerts on missing or abnormal results

steps.title: Define workflows and control points
steps.desc: Set up your workflows and required checkpoints.

steps.title: Capture data from teams and systems
steps.desc: Teams fill forms; data is collected from existing systems.

steps.title: Detect delays, deviations, and missing checks
steps.desc: The system automatically flags what wasn't done or falls outside the norm.

steps.title: Trigger alerts, follow-up, and visibility
steps.desc: Alerts fire, follow-up is structured, and teams get full visibility.

items.title: Production monitoring
items.desc: Track processes by line and shift.

compliance.title: Compliance and certifications
compliance.intro: The system helps factories support readiness for:
compliance.disclaimer: The system helps reduce compliance risk, supports audit readiness, and improves traceability. It does not guarantee full compliance.

benefits.title: Business value
items: Better consistency across shifts and lines

items.q: Is this a replacement for our QA or lab team?
items.a: No. The system complements your teams — it reduces manual load and improves visibility and traceability.

items.q: Can we start with one plant or one process?
items.a: Yes. You can roll out gradually at a single plant or for a specific process.
Yes. The system is designed to fit existing factory workflows.
Yes. The interface is fully available in Hebrew.

items.q: Can it integrate with existing systems?
items.a: Yes. Integration with existing systems is possible as needed.
It depends on scope. Typically a few weeks to get started.

cta.title: Request a demo
cta.subtitle: Fill in your details and we'll get back to you soon.

about.title: About
about.content: We help food factories in Israel reduce manual quality monitoring work, improve traceability, and better prepare for regulatory and certification requirements. Our team understands the challenges of QA, lab, and operations in food manufacturing.

team.name: Eng. Noam Egel
team.role: Senior consultant in food safety and regulation
team.bio: Extensive experience supporting food factories, retail chains, catering companies, and institutional kitchens. Specializes in planning and establishing food businesses and factories, and implementing HACCP systems, food safety procedures, and quality standards.
team.detail: In his work, he accompanies organizations from the planning and construction of facilities, through building food safety management systems and writing procedures, to meeting Ministry of Health requirements and international standards.

team.name: Dr. Yafim Afraimov
team.role: Expert in public health, regulation and standards in food and quality
team.bio: Extensive experience supporting manufacturers, importers, and retail chains in meeting regulatory requirements, implementing food quality and safety standards, and establishing management and control systems.
team.detail: Dr. Afraimov has practical knowledge and experience working with international and local standards, including Ministry of Health regulation and international market requirements. In his work, he accompanies organizations in licensing processes, product labeling, risk assessments, and compliance testing.

team.name: Alon Zanbar
team.role: Senior in technology and software engineering
team.bio: Extensive experience leading large development organizations and establishing complex software platforms at scale. Specializes in cloud-based systems, artificial intelligence and advanced optimization, and leading global engineering teams from idea to market-ready product.
team.detail: In his work, he leads development of innovative technological products from specification and architecture, through building scalable systems and advanced development processes, to deployment and operation in production environments for large-scale organizations and clients.

contact.title: Contact
contact.intro: Interested in a demo? Fill in your details and we'll get back to you.

privacy.title: Privacy policy
privacy.content: This privacy policy describes how we collect, use, and protect your information. We respect your privacy and are committed to protecting your data.
